candidates.text:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation Notice>>

Dear Boss,

I am writing to formally inform you of my decision to resign from my position, effective [last working day]. This was not an easy decision to make, but after careful consideration, I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals.

I am grateful for the opportunities I have had during my time here and for the support and guidance you have provided. I have truly enjoyed working with the team and learning from you.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will do everything I can to wrap up my current projects and assist with the handover process over the next two weeks. Please let me know how I can best support the team during this period.

Thank you again for everything. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]

Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation Letter>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

I am writing to formally inform you of my decision to resign from my position at [Company Name], effective [Last Working Day]. This was not an easy decision to make, but after careful consideration, I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals.

I am grateful for the opportunities I have had during my time here. I have enjoyed working with you and the team, and I have learned a great deal. I want to ensure a smooth transition during my remaining time. Please let me know how I can best assist in handing over my responsibilities and training my replacement over the coming weeks.

Thank you for your support and guidance. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[My Name]

Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation Letter>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

I am writing to formally inform you of my decision to resign from my position at [Company Name], effective [Last Working Day, e.g., two weeks from today].

This was a difficult decision to make, but after careful consideration, I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals. I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities and support you have provided me during my time here. I have truly enjoyed working with you and the team, and I have learned a great deal.

To ensure a smooth transition, I am committed to completing my current projects and will work closely with the team to hand over my responsibilities over the coming weeks. Please let me know how I can best assist in this process.

Thank you again for everything. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation Letter>>

Dear Boss,

I am writing to formally inform you of my decision to resign from my position. My last day will be [Date].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities and support you have provided me during my time here. It has been a pleasure working with you and the team.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will do everything possible to wrap up my current projects and assist with the handover before my departure.

Thank you again for everything.

Best regards,

[My Name]
